[1086.150-1198.870] interviewee: no orders what to do with the Jews. And he said, oh, he welcomed me. And now go back to your hometown. It's already in Germany. And they helped me even with transportation and trucks and cars-- either way. And in a few days, I was already home. We marched 10 days. But maybe two,  three days I was home already.
